hero.subtitle: Experience bold flavors crafted from premium ingredients. From crispy burgers to gourmet pizzas - every bite is an adventure worth savoring.

about.description: At Sarab, we combine fresh local ingredients with traditional recipes to offer an unforgettable dining experience. Every dish is a story of passion والأصالة.

footer.address_description: 77 Gourmet Avenue, Food District, Manhattan, NY 10001
footer.description: We bring the world's finest flavors together in a fast, friendly, and affordable experience. Every meal crafted with love.

reviews.text: Ordered delivery and the food arrived hot and fresh in 22 minutes. Portions are generous. Sarab has become my go-to comfort food spot without question.
reviews.name: Cameron Fox

reviews.text: The truffle pasta blew my mind. I didn't expect that quality from a fast food place. Great ambiance, super friendly staff. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: Priya Sharma

reviews.text: Catered our office party of 50 people and everything was flawless. Fresh, delicious, on time and well presented. Nashville chicken was the absolute star!
reviews.name: David Park

reviews.text: The burgers here are on another level! Perfectly juicy, fresh buns, and the signature sauce is incredible. Will definitely order again.
reviews.name: Sarah Jenkins

reviews.text: Best dessert spot in town. The chocolate lava cake is a must-try, and the staff made us feel so welcome!
reviews.name: Michael Chang
